narrative_guidance_doc.name: Q4 2024 shareholder letter — FY2025 cash content spend outlook
narrative_guidance_doc.excerpt:
Netflix, Inc. — Q4 2024 Shareholder Letter (January 21, 2025)

Cash Flow and Capital Structure

For 2025, assuming no material swings in F/X, we expect to generate FCF of about $8B. Our forecast assumes cash content spend of roughly $18B and an estimated $800M in cash outflows related to the timing of certain direct and indirect tax deposits, which is in addition to our typical annual tax obligations.

(Forward-looking guidance — annual cash content spend, not quarterly GAAP actuals.)

Management's Discussion and Analysis:

Payments for content assets are included in net cash provided by operating activities. Content amortization on the income statement is not the same as content cash payments on the cash flow statement.
